footer.brand_desc: Preserving the Legacy Carved in Stone

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Bridging Past & Present
mission.p1: The project combines cultural heritage, field data collection, and digital technology to preserve the invisible traces of architectural tradition.
mission.p2: Every stonemason mark tells a story - of the craftsman who carved it, the guild they belonged to, and the monument they helped build. Stone Mark brings these stories to light.

cta.title: Join Us in Preserving History
cta.desc: Be part of a global movement to document and protect the craft traditions that shaped our world
cta.footer: Open collaboration ensures the project remains transparent, reliable, and useful to both the public and the academic community.

partner.title: Our Institutional Partner
partner.subtitle: Portuguese Association for the Urban Rehabilitation and Protection of Heritage
partner.desc: APRUPP is a non-profit association dedicated to the study, protection, and promotion of urban heritage, with a special focus on the preservation of traditional construction techniques and the memory of the built environment.
partner.heritage_desc: Promoting the safeguarding and appreciation of architectural and cultural heritage.
partner.urban_desc: Supporting sustainable urban rehabilitation and the revitalization of historic centers.
partner.civic_desc: Encouraging community participation in the protection of heritage.
partner.knowledge_desc: Disseminating research and best practices in heritage conservation.

hero.label: About the Project
hero.title:
Preserving History,
One Mark at a Time.
hero.desc: Stone Mark is a web application dedicated to the documentation and exploration of stonemason marks — the unique symbols engraved by ancient craftsmen on monuments across history.

features.label: Key Features
features.title: Tools for Heritage Explorers
features.desc: Designed to make your journey through history seamless, engaging, and unforgettable

1.title: Capture & Submit Marks
1.desc: Photograph and submit authentic stonemason marks directly from the app, contributing to a growing digital archive of craftsmanship heritage.

2.title: Search Monuments
2.desc: Discover monuments and stonemason symbols through a fast and intuitive search experience.

3.title: Advanced Filtering
3.desc: Filter marks by monument to explore detailed cultural patterns and associations.

4.title: Bookmarks & Collections
4.desc: Save your favourite monuments or marks to personalized collections — perfect for research, teaching, or exploration.

5.title: Geolocation on Map
5.desc: Explore nearby stonemason marks and monuments in real-time using an interactive map with precise geolocation features.

6.title: Cultural Preservation
6.desc: Support the documentation and preservation of stonemason heritage through community participation and open historical data.

unesco.label: Global Initiative
unesco.title: Partnering with UNESCO
unesco.desc: Stone Mark is being developed in collaboration with UNESCO to preserve and promote world heritage sites. With proven technology and a scalable architecture, we're preparing for international expansion.
unesco.impact_desc: Empowering millions to connect with heritage
unesco.growth_desc: Built for scale with proven architecture

discover-hero-section.label: The Real Deal
discover-hero-section.title: Deciphering the Stone Code.
discover-hero-section.desc: Masons' marks are the unsung autographs of the architects of our past. StoneMark uses AI to document, group, and preserve these fading symbols for future generations.

1.label: Customization
1.title: History in the Details
1.desc: Stonecutters were paid by the piece. To ensure they got their due, they carved a personal symbol into every block they finished. These marks are personal, geometrical, and infinitely varied.

2.label: Preservation
2.title: Fighting Time
2.desc: Weather, pollution, and renovation are slowly erasing these marks. By creating a digital twin of every mark found, we ensure that even if the stone crumbles, the mason's signature remains.

discover-why-it-matters-section.label: The Significance
discover-why-it-matters-section.title: Why Mason's Marks Matter
discover-why-it-matters-section.desc: These simple carvings are a direct link to the individual artisans who built our shared heritage, offering insights into history, culture, and craftsmanship.

1.title: Signatures of the Builders
1.desc: Marks act as personal signatures, helping identify specific masons and how construction sites were organized, especially where written records are scarce.

2.title: Construction Clues
2.desc: Different symbols reveal distinct construction phases and the evolution of craftsmanship, allowing researchers to map a monument's history.

3.title: Traces of Cultural Exchange
3.desc: Similar marks found across vast distances suggest the migration of masons and the spread of shared knowledge, acting as archaeological fingerprints.

4.title: A Fragile Heritage
4.desc: Slowly disappearing due to erosion and pollution, these marks are a fragile heritage. Digital documentation is crucial to preserve them for future study.

1.title: Find a Mark
1.desc: Locate a mason's mark on a historical monument, cathedral wall, or ancient bridge structure.

2.title: Capture
2.desc: Take a high-contrast photo using your telephone camera. Good lighting helps reveal faint carvings.

3.title: AI Analysis
3.desc: Our embeddings model analyzes the geometry, grouping similar marks across different locations.

4.title: Heritage
4.desc: The mark is indexed into the global public database, accessible to researchers worldwide.

discover-contribution-section.title: Contributing to the Project
discover-contribution-section.desc: StoneMark is an open, academic-minded initiative. For those with technical, design, or research experience, contributions to the platform itself are welcome.
discover-contribution-section.footer: Open collaboration ensures the project remains transparent, reliable, and useful to both the public and the academic community.

discover-inter-marks-section.label: Methodology
discover-inter-marks-section.title: Interpreting Mason’s Marks
discover-inter-marks-section.desc: An overview of how specialists understand and classify these marks, offering a deeper insight into their significance.

types.personal_desc: The most common type, used to identify a mason's work for payment and quality control.
types.assembly_desc: Practical instructions like 'this side up' or numbering for sequential placement.
types.symbolic_desc: Rarer marks with ritual functions, believed to ward off evil or mark sacred boundaries.

discover-inter-marks-section.carving_desc: How a mark was carved provides clues about its period and maker. The depth, angle, and rhythm of the chisel strokes are all valuable data points for analysis.

carving.point_desc: Produces small circular depressions, common in late medieval periods.
carving.flat_desc: Creates clean linear incisions, used for quick tally signatures.

discover-inter-marks-section.arch_desc: When studied collectively, mason's marks serve as micro-historical evidence, allowing researchers to reconstruct construction phases and map the movement of craftsmen.

arch.phases_desc: Clusters of identical marks can indicate a specific period of work or later repairs using different teams.
arch.map_desc: Similar symbols appearing across distant sites help trace medieval mobility and the transmission of architectural knowledge.

discover-inter-marks-section.challenges_desc: Context is everything. The same simple symbol could be used by many masons, and weathering can alter the original shape, making interpretation a complex puzzle.
discover-inter-marks-section.human_desc: Ultimately, interpreting these marks transforms stone walls into documents of lived history. They reveal the identities, movements, and techniques of artisans whose names were never recorded, bringing us closer to the human story behind our greatest monuments.

contribute-hero-section.label: Help & Guide
contribute-hero-section.title:
Discover. Capture.
Preserve.
contribute-hero-section.desc: Every mark tells a story. Join thousands of explorers preserving cultural heritage, one stone mark at a time.

contribute-trust-indicators.gdpr_desc: Your data is protected with industry-leading security standards
contribute-trust-indicators.community_desc: Join a global network of heritage enthusiasts and historians
contribute-trust-indicators.ai_desc: Automatic analysis with human moderation for accuracy

contribute-how-it-works.header_desc: No complex forms. Just chat with our bot to preserve stonemason marks in seconds.
contribute-how-it-works.step1_desc: Start a chat and verify your phone number. Quick, secure, and linked to you.
contribute-how-it-works.step2_desc: Send a photo of the mark. Our AI instantly analyzes it for matches.
contribute-how-it-works.step3_desc: Share your location in chat. We find the nearest monument automatically.
contribute-how-it-works.step4_desc: Review details, add a note if needed, and confirm. History preserved!
contribute-how-it-works.guide_desc: A step-by-step look at how your discovery becomes history.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed1_desc: The bot requests your phone number to securely authenticate you and link every interaction to your registered user profile.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed2_desc: Once verified, the bot presents available actions. Simply choose to 'Propose a Stonemason's Mark' to start.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed3_desc: You'll be asked to submit a clear photograph of the mark. This visual record is the core of your contribution.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed4_desc: Upon receiving your image, our intelligent system processes it and attempts to identify similar existing marks in the archive.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed5_desc: Share the geographic location of the mark directly via WhatsApp or Telegram's location-sharing feature.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed6_desc: The bot automatically checks for nearby monuments. If none are found, you'll be asked to manually enter the monument's name.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed7_desc: You'll get a chance to review all the information. You can confirm it as is or make modifications if needed.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed8_desc: Optionally, add descriptive notes about the occurrence—context, condition, or any interesting observations.
contribute-how-it-works.detailed9_desc: Finally, the bot confirms your submission and notifies you that the stonemason mark has been successfully proposed.

contribute-privacy-section.label: Privacy & Security
contribute-privacy-section.title: Your Privacy Matters
contribute-privacy-section.desc: Fully GDPR compliant — your data is secure and always under your control
contribute-privacy-section.photo_meta_desc: Photo file with basic metadata (GPS, timestamp)
contribute-privacy-section.user_attr_desc: User ID for proper authorship attribution
contribute-privacy-section.full_control_desc: When you delete an account, submissions are updated as having been sent anonymously.
contribute-privacy-section.no_sharing_desc: No personal data shared without consent
contribute-privacy-section.promise_p1: Your trust is fundamental. We never sell, share, or use your data for commercial purposes.
contribute-privacy-section.promise_p2: Privacy is a right — and here, it is respected at every step.

contribute-cta-section.title: Ready to Make History?
contribute-cta-section.desc: Join our growing community of explorers, historians, and heritage enthusiasts. Every contribution helps preserve stories carved in stone for future generations.

home-hero-section.label: Digital Archive
home-hero-section.desc: Join a global community documenting stonemason marks. From medieval monasteries to hidden chapels, help us preserve the signatures of the past.

home-popular-section.title: Most Popular Monuments
home-popular-section.subtitle: Discover the most visited and appreciated monuments by our community

home-last-marks-section.title: Latest Mason Marks
home-last-marks-section.subtitle: Explore the most recent mason marks documented by our community

home-map-section.title: Heritage in Maps
home-map-section.subtitle: Browse monuments and their marks directly on the interactive map

home-last-news-section.title: Latest News
home-last-news-section.subtitle: Stay updated with the most recent news from our community
home-last-news-section.error: Failed to load news. Please try again later.
home-last-news-section.empty: No news available at the moment.

search-header.marks_desc: Explore our collection of historic mason marks found across monuments. Each mark tells a unique story of the craftsmen who left their signature in stone.

support.title: Need Additional Support?
support.desc: If you need additional accessibility features or encounter any issues, please don't hesitate to contact our support team. We're committed to making StoneMark accessible to everyone.

hero.title: We Would Love to Hear from You.
hero.subtitle: Have questions about Stone Mark? Want to collaborate or report an issue? We are here to help preserve history together.

response.title: Response Time
response.detail: We typically respond within 24-48 hours on business days.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.description: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...

form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again or contact us directly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Stone Mark

what_is.a: Stone Mark is a collaborative web platform dedicated to the documentation, study, and preservation of stonemason marks — the distinctive symbols carved by medieval craftsmen on monuments, churches, and historic buildings. The project merges cultural heritage with modern geospatial technology to make these marks accessible worldwide.

who_can_participate.a: Anyone interested in cultural heritage can contribute! Whether you are a researcher, student, or curious explorer, you can upload photos of marks, add monument details, or help validate existing records. Community participation is at the heart of Stone Mark.

how_contribute.q: How can I contribute to the project?
how_contribute.a: You can contribute by photographing and submitting new stonemason marks, sharing information about monuments or helping verify existing data. Simply create an account, log in, and start exploring the database.

is_free.q: Is Stone Mark free to use?
is_free.a: Yes. Stone Mark is completely free and open to everyone. Our mission is to promote open access to historical knowledge and engage the public in the documentation of cultural heritage.

use_data.q: Can I use Stone Mark for academic or research purposes?
use_data.a: Absolutely. Stone Mark supports historians, archaeologists, and students in their research. All monuments, marks are documented with metadata that can be cited in academic work. If you need specific datasets or collaboration opportunities, please contact our team.

reliable.a: All submitted data goes through a validation process involving both automated checks and manual review by our moderation team and partner institutions. However, as this is a collaborative project, users are encouraged to report any inaccuracies they find.

correct_info.q: How can I correct or update existing information?
correct_info.a: If you notice inaccurate or incomplete information on a monument, mark, or guild page, you can click the 'Edit' button to submit corrections directly through an editable form. Your changes will be reviewed and validated by our moderation team before being published to ensure data accuracy and integrity.

institutions.q: Can institutions collaborate with Stone Mark?
institutions.a: Yes. We actively collaborate with museums, universities, heritage associations, and cultural organizations. Partnerships help expand the database, improve accuracy, and promote preservation initiatives. If your institution is interested, please contact us.

location_accuracy.q: How accurate is the location data?
location_accuracy.a: All locations are georeferenced with care using GPS data, official records, and community validation. We continuously update coordinates to ensure precision. If you detect a mismatch in the location of a monument or mark, you can easily report it.

data_protection.q: How is my personal data protected?
data_protection.a: We value your privacy. All user information is encrypted and stored securely. We comply with GDPR and all relevant data protection regulations. Contributions are publicly attributed to your username, but no private information is shared unless you choose to make it visible.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our platform

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using StoneMark, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.content: StoneMark is a digital platform for documenting, studying, and preserving stonemason marks found on historic monuments. We provide tools for users to contribute photographs, historical information, and research data related to architectural heritage.

user_accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
user_accounts.content: To access certain features, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account.

user_content.title: 4. User-Generated Content
user_content.content: Users may submit photographs, descriptions, and historical information. By submitting content, you grant StoneMark a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, and distribute your content for the purposes of operating and promoting the platform. You represent that you own or have the necessary rights to submit the content.

prohibited.title: 5. Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.content: You agree not to: (a) upload false, misleading, or malicious content; (b) violate any applicable laws or regulations; (c) infringe on intellectual property rights; (d) attempt to gain unauthorized access to the platform; (e) harass, abuse, or harm other users.

intellectual_property.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectual_property.content: The platform and its original content (excluding user-generated content) are the property of StoneMark and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. User-generated content remains the property of the respective contributors, subject to the license granted to StoneMark.

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: StoneMark is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any content on the platform. Use of the service is at your own risk.

limitation.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: StoneMark and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the platform, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.

modifications.title: 9. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account and access to the platform at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties, or for any other reason.

governing_law.title: 11. Governing Law
governing_law.content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Portugal, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Portugal.

contact.title: 12. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@stonemark.org

data.title: Data Collected
data.text: Account data, platform interactions, and submitted content (e.g., photos and respective metadata).

purposes.title: Purposes
purposes.text: Account management, service provision, application improvement, and compliance with legal obligations.

gdpr.title: GDPR & Rights
gdpr.text: Processing based on Article 6 of the GDPR. Ensures access, rectification, erasure, and other legal guarantees for data subjects.

intro.p1: At Stonemark, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your data when you use our platform.
intro.p2: By using Stonemark, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our services.

data.title: 1. What personal data do we collect?

personal.title: Identification data
personal.desc: In the context of using the application, we may collect and process the following categories of personal data:
personal.items: name, email address, and, if applicable, profile photo.

content.title: Submitted content
content.items: photos, descriptions, and associated technical metadata (such as capture date/time and, if authorized, approximate location).

technical.title: Technical data
technical.items: basic device and browser information, necessary to ensure the platform's security and proper functioning.

purposes.title: 2. Purposes of processing and legal basis (GDPR)
purposes.desc: Personal data is processed for specific, explicit, and legitimate purposes, in accordance with Article 5 of the GDPR. In particular:

account.title: Account management and authentication
account.desc: to allow registration, login, and continuous use of the application.
account.legal: (Legal basis: Article 6(1)(b) – performance of a contract.)

management.title: Management of submitted content
management.desc: to receive, store, and display photos and associated information, as well as manage the submission history.
management.legal: (Legal basis: Article 6(1)(b) – performance of a contract.)

improvement.title: Platform improvement and security
improvement.desc: to monitor performance, prevent abuse, and improve features.

compliance.title: Compliance with legal obligations
compliance.desc: to respond to requests from competent authorities or comply with applicable legal requirements.
compliance.legal: (Legal basis: Article 6(1)(c) – compliance with a legal obligation.)

retention.title: 3. Data retention period
retention.desc: Personal data is retained only for the period necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, in accordance with the storage limitation principle (Article 5(1)(e) of the GDPR):
retention.account: Account data: kept while the account is active or until a deletion request is made.
retention.content: Submitted content: kept as long as it is relevant for the use of the application or until a deletion request by the user.
retention.logs: Technical and security logs: retained for shorter periods, strictly necessary for auditing and security.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing of personal data
sharing.desc: We do not sell or commercialize your personal data. Data sharing is limited to the following cases:
sharing.providers: Service providers strictly necessary for the technical operation of the platform, subject to confidentiality obligations.
sharing.legal: When required by law or by a competent authority, under European Union or Member State law.
sharing.consent: With your explicit consent, if applicable, for additional purposes clearly identified.

rights.title: 5. Data subject rights
rights.desc: Under Articles 12 to 22 of the GDPR, users have, among others, the following rights:

access.title: Right of access
access.desc: to obtain confirmation as to whether your data is being processed and to access that information.

rectification.title: Right to rectification
rectification.desc: to request the correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.

erasure.title: Right to erasure
erasure.desc: to request the deletion of data when legal requirements are met.

restriction.title: Right to restriction of processing
restriction.desc: to request the temporary suspension of certain processing operations.

objection.title: Right to object
objection.desc: to object to processing based on legitimate interest, for reasons related to your particular situation.

portability.title: Right to data portability
portability.desc: to receive the data you have provided to us in a structured format, or request its transmission to another controller.

rights.exercise: To exercise any of these rights, you may contact us through the means indicated in the following section.

security.title: 6. Data security and contacts
security.desc1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, destruction, or improper alteration.
security.desc2: As this is an academic project, any additional questions about privacy or requests regarding your data can be addressed to the team responsible for the application.
